tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.0%), indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control and possible prediabetes or early diabetes. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are normal. Recommend monitoring glycemic control and considering lifestyle or therapeutic interventions as appropriate.

text.div: Provider Organization: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

name.value: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
